scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx gh-pages -d dist
scripts.docker:build: npm run build && podman build -t docker.io/blakai/feierabendbaecker . && podman save docker.io/blakai/feierabendbaecker -o \\diskstation2\docker\feierabendbaecker\feierabendbaecker.tar && copy docker-compose.yml \\diskstation2\docker\feierabendbaecker\docker-compose.yml
scripts.docker:deploy: ssh dsmadmin@diskstation2 "/usr/local/bin/docker load -i /volume1/docker/feierabendbaecker/feierabendbaecker.tar && /usr/local/bin/docker image prune -f && /usr/local/bin/docker compose -f /volume1/docker/feierabendbaecker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate 2>&1"
scripts.docker:full: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:deploy
